name: Jarvis (deprecated router)
description: DEPRECATED — Jarvis no longer routes agents to framework/library playbooks. Use docs/roadmap/ and docs/stack-scaffolding/. See docs/stack-scaffolding/legacy-review.md (JR-STACK-007). Decision: JR-LEGACY-004.

base: Jarvis is a project-foundation documentation platform, not a framework knowledge base.
Read docs/roadmap/README.md and docs/stack-scaffolding/README.md before initializing a target project.
Stack-specific rules, MCP setup, and best practices belong in the target project after handoff.
